title: Ride
overview: Shun Asanaga, a young man with an obsession with crystals, finds himself pulled into a world within one.

title: Endora
overview: After escaping the castle, an encounter with an old friend helps reveal some of the mysteries surrounding Endora.

title: Journey
overview: Shun and Emilio escape to a hideout but soon abandon it to begin their journey to defeat Delzaine.

title: Ignauts
overview: When they're ambushed by a band of revolutionaries, Shun and Emilio make surprising new allies.

title: Assault
overview: Lacking in numbers to revolt, the Ignauts consider an alliance with the very group that attacks them.

title: Determination
overview: After reuniting with Pascal and Alicia, Shun's determination to return home is stronger than ever.

title: Girl
overview: While visiting the port city of Ametius to obtain a ship, a deadly killer threatens the adventure.

title: Lone Isle
overview: After taking to the seas on a battered ship, the Ignauts head for an island to recruit the help of the Zoozians.

title: Father and Child
overview: Alicia discovers the truth about her father during a surprise encounter with dragons.

title: Feelings
overview: As Delzaine and the Ignauts both close in on Babylon, Pascal attempts to solve the mystery of the decreasing Warp Particles.

title: Depths
overview: Upon reaching Babylon, the Ignauts are deceived by more than its size and the traps that await inside.

title: The Light of Babel
overview: The showdown reaches full swing as Babel starts up, bringing an end to an enemy in more than one way.

title: Tracks
overview: While Pascal and Joseph are busy inspecting Babel, the others look back on how far they've come.

title: Resume
overview: With chaos and riots on the rise, the Ignauts make plans to bring order while marching back towards the capital for more research.

title: Monster
overview: When they attempt to save a crippled village, the Ignauts run into an old enemy and make an unexpected new ally.

title: Longing
overview: In order to recruit the help of the Gradido and the island Zoozians, the Ignauts must fight back against a naval invasion.

title: Return
overview: No sooner is the group welcomed home to the castle than a menace appears in the forest and threatens the capital.

title: Prisoner
overview: While fields and forests decay, deep under the dungeons of the castle, Shun and Emilio learn more about the past before being swept away.

title: Surface
overview: Taken to the surface, Shun introduces Emilio to his familiar world and a confrontation with Shun's father triggers some of Emilio's forgotten memories.

title: Past
overview: After hearing Asanaga's shocking declaration, Shun and Emilio discover secrets of the past, the truth of their families, and a shared bond.

title: Confrontation
overview: Though troubled by his father's actions, Shun learns about his motivation and the reason they're able to travel between worlds.

title: Crisis
overview: Back in Endora, the Ignauts face up against a monsterous Ibelda and learn about the ancient ruins which may be funneling Warp Particles to the surface.

title: Showdown
overview: While Demetrio and the Ignauts battle Ibelda, Shun, Emilio and Falarion go to Tir Na Nog to destroy the device draining Warp Particles from Endora.

title: Demise
overview: The final battle to determine the fate of Endora balances atop the high-reaching spire of Tir Na Nog.
